title: Customer-managed keys for Lakebase available in all AWS and Azure regions
body: Customer-managed keys (CMK) for Lakebase Autoscaling are now available in all Lakebase regions on AWS and Azure. CMK encrypts Lakebase Autoscaling project data at rest using a key your organization owns in its cloud KMS. CMK is available for new Lakebase Autoscaling projects. Lakebase Provisioned instances do not support CMK. See [Customer-managed keys for Lakebase](/aws/en/oltp/projects/customer-managed-keys).
